description: Docker + GitHub Actions hardening. Group base images, group common actions, flag runtime majors as breaking, track version-pinned global npm installs in Dockerfiles.

packageRules.description: Dockerfile base images — group bumps + digest pins together
GitHub Actions artifact family — upload + download must stay paired
Runtime/data-tier major bumps are breaking-change candidates — extra labels

customManagers.description: Bump version-pinned global npm installs in Dockerfiles: a `# renovate: datasource=X depName=Y` hint comment immediately followed by `RUN npm install -g pkg@VERSION`. Renovate's native dockerfile manager only sees FROM lines, so this reaches global tool installs (serve, pnpm, etc.). INVARIANT: inter-field separators use `[ \t]`, never `\s` — `\s` matches `\n` and cross-attributes fields across blocks (same hazard as the workflow custom manager in default.json).

Track Dockerfile `ARG PNPM_VERSION=…` against the npm `pnpm` package so corepack stays in lockstep with `package.json:packageManager`. Without this, Renovate bumps the npm side, the Dockerfile drifts, and pnpm ≥11 hits ERR_PNPM_ABORTED_REMOVE_MODULES_DIR_NO_TTY when corepack tries a runtime install. Intentionally narrow: only the `ARG PNPM_VERSION=<value>` shape — `ENV …`, `RUN npm i -g pnpm@…`, and bare `corepack prepare pnpm@… --activate` are handled by the customManager above or fall outside scope. Folds into the `toolchain-versions` group in node.json via depName.
Track Dockerfile `ARG YARN_VERSION=…` against the npm `yarn` package. Same corepack drift hazard as pnpm; symmetric solution.
